architecture.summary: Extract resolveIncrementId() from evaluate-completion.ts to shared utility at src/utils/resolve-increment-id.ts. Change complete command from single-arg to variadic. Follows existing archive command patterns.

integrations.summary: No new integrations. Complete command already triggers GitHub/JIRA/ADO sync. Batch mode calls same completeIncrement() per ID.

ui-ux.summary: CLI-only. Short-ID saves typing. Batch mode: single command for multiple IDs. Error messages follow existing chalk pattern. Summary line at end of batch.

performance.summary: N/A. CLI command, not hot path. Sequential batch. resolveIncrementId() does single readdirSync.

security.summary: Short-ID resolution uses validateIncrementId() on resolved slug. Path traversal protection preserved. Resolver only searches .specweave/increments/.

edge-cases.summary: Ambiguous short-IDs fail with listed matches. Zero matches fail with clear error. Batch: one failure does not stop others. AC validator: fix parseTasksWithUSLinks arg from content to path. Already-completed increments return true.
